title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BankBazaar - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BankBazaar - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the BankBazaar family as a Backend Developer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BankBazaar:
BankBazaar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar!
